programme.title: TVP@TTV Pend. Islam Ting. 2 Ep02
programme.desc: Menyapu Balutan -: Tajuk ini akan membahaskan tentang konsep rukhsah dalam syariat Islam, maksud dan dalil menyapu balutan, cara mengangkat hadas dalam keadaan anggota berwudhuk berbalut.

programme.title: TVP@TTV Pend. Islam Ting. 1 Ep03
programme.desc: Tajuk Makanan Halal Lagi Baik ini membincangkan tentang kita dituntut untuk mengambil makanan yang halal lagi baik. Untuk memperkembangkan lagi topik ini, murid diperjelaskan dengan maksud makanan halal dan makanan haram. Selain itu, topik ini juga menerangkan tentang akibat pengambilan makanan yang haram kepada rohani dan jasmani serta perbezaan ciri-ciri makanan halal dan makanan haram. Di samp

programme.title: TVP@TTV Pend. Syariah Islamiah Ting. 4 Ep02
programme.desc: Rancangan ini membincangkan secara terperinci tentang 3 jenis Akad Tabbaru' dari segi bahasa dan istilah, dalil keharusan akad, rukun dan syarat akad.

programme.title: TVP@TTV Pend. Islam Ting. 4 Ep01
programme.desc: Rancangan ini membincangkan tentang kepentingan berdakwah, kupasan surah Fussilat (surah 41, ayat 33), menyelusuri gelombang dakwah semasa para anbiya hingga kini Tuntutan beramal soleh dan berbangga menjadi muslim turut dibincangkan.

programme.title: TVP@TTV Pend. Islam Ting. 1 Ep02
programme.desc: Topik ini menerangkan tentang pengertian jahiliah. Diperincikan hal kejahilan dalam bidang akidah dan akhlak serta pelbagai pegangan akidah yang dianuti oleh masyarakat jahiliyah. Kejahilan masyarakat Arab ini masih wujud dan ada di antaranya masih diamalkan sehingga sekarang. Murid murid dikehendaki meninggalkan akhlak buruk yang terdapat dalam masyarakat sekarang yang mirip kejahilan masyarakat

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: After a morning on the Bayou, the Duck Camp Dinners crew enjoy a fresh cooked dinner while discussing the changing coastal wetlands of Louisiana. programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: After a late night of good times, venison chili, and some old school roux the crew heads out for another day of hunting ducks. Adaptability is critical, and after a couple of quick adjustments the team finds themselves back in the ducks.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation EP-9
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela's” in 1961, he was unaware it would become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it's only fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela, on this high-impact journey of discovery, as he uncovers some lesser-known facts about conservation. In particular, the role which hunting and the utilization of wildlife

programme.title: The Whale Whisperer
programme.desc: This film follows the inspiring relationship between whale whisperer Vicki Neville and thehumpback whales of Australia. Never-before-seen behaviours have been documented by a team of five cinematographers over the three-month whale season in Hervey Bay, all captured in glorious 4K. These stunning close encounters capture whales like you have never seen them before!

programme.title: Strangers in Danger
programme.desc: In this food-filled episode, Catfish throws up all over the world. The biking duo try various forms of genitalia including bull testicle, tiger and sea penis, virgin eggs, otherwise known as pee billed eggs, and more. They try duck head in China and worm tequila and mosquito eggs in Mexico. The question becomes, can you keep it down while watching this special episode?

programme.title: ADA DUA CINTA EPS 29
programme.desc: It tells the story of two girls, Mecca (who comes from humble circumstances) and Medina (who is wealthy), who are connected through Ayu—Mecca's biological mother—who adopted Medina. programme.title: CAHAYA TERINDAH EPS 12
programme.desc: A drama series that tells the story of Indah (Ranty Maria) and her struggle to find her biological family after discovering that she was adopted. She runs away to Jakarta from her adoptive father (Jamal), who intends to sell her, and ends up working for the Hendardi family, where she faces romantic conflicts and emotional mysteries from her past.

programme.title: KESETIAAN JANJI CINTA EPS 89
programme.desc: Meira no longer feels happy in her marriage. Lately, Arya, her husband, constantly looks for faults in her. As a result, Meira and Arya often get into arguments. The situation reaches its peak when Arya refuses to provide for Meira anymore. He even refuses to help cover the medical expenses of Meira's mother, Siti. Arya also stops paying for Lani's college tuition, Meira's younger sister. Even tho

programme.title: Tom & Jerry
programme.desc: Jerry, a mischievous mouse, takes refuge in a fancy hotel that is set to host a wedding. In order to get rid of him, one of the event planners hires Jerry's feline rival, Tom.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes and Dr Watson send Lord Henry Blackwood, a serial killer, to the gallows. However, they are shocked to learn that he is back from the dead and pursue him again.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: Peter Parker faces Electro and his old friend who is dying and looks out for Spider-Man's blood in order to cure himself.

programme.title: Piranha 3D
programme.desc: An earthquake cracks open the bottom of a lake, releasing a prehistoric species of piranha. As sinister events unfold due to the flesh-eating fish, a group of strangers teams up to stop the bloodbath.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Four teens are transported into a magical jungle game, becoming adult avatars and must navigate challenges to return home safely.

programme.title: American Made
programme.desc: Barry Seal is a US pilot who smuggles drugs for the CIA in the 1980s. Later, his secret work gets revealed as part of the Iran-Contra scandal.

programme.title: Kong: Skull Island
programme.desc: A crew that reaches Skull Island to map it, is attacked by a humongous ape. The survivors then regroup to find out more about the ape, the island's natives and underground monsters.

programme.title: 300: Rise of an Empire
programme.desc: Xerxes, seeking revenge for his father's death, declares war on Greece. As a result, Themistocles, the Athenian admiral, is compelled to form an alliance with Sparta to protect Athens.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt, an elite intelligence agent, is branded a traitor following a disastrous mission in Prague. He recruits a team of operatives to help him retrieve a computer disk that can clear his name.

programme.title: Vaagai Sooda Vaa Ep58
programme.desc: Sumathi raises her daughters, Thenmozhi and Meenakshi, with values. Thenmozhi marries into Mano's debt-ridden family. But, to protect Thenmozhi and restore the family's dignity, Meenakshi weds Jeeva.

programme.title: Oru Kidayin Karunai Manu
programme.desc: The newlywed Ramamurthy and his clan are on their way to a temple. An accident brings hilarious changes to their itinerary as they try to evade the police.

programme.desc: The show narrates a heartwarming love story between a traditional girl and a rock star singer, beautifully blending the contrasting worlds of simplicity and glamour.

programme.desc: Gagan and Bhoomi lose connections with their fathers due to a tragedy. Bhoomi grows up hoping to find her roots, while Gagan develops hatred for his father. How will their destiny bring them together?

programme.desc: This drama is set in the Jiufen area from the 1960s to the 1970s. It tells the story of how three brothers conquered the world with their bare hands. programme.title: Heavenly Hand - EP 2 / 麻雀乐团

programme.title: ER 24/7 - EP 2 / 命悬一线
programme.desc: While urban and rural hospitals differ greatly in equipment and resources, a well-structured system can significantly enhance emergency department efficiency. In this episode, we explore the A&E of Singapore’s National University Hospital and Thailand’s Umphang Hospital. We witness how medical teams safeguard life at its most fragile under two very different systems.

programme.desc: A car accident involving two foster children leads detectives Beck and Stabler to the foster parents and questionable medical practices involving a controversial "rebirthing" therapy.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A cancer patient (Brian Dennehy) makes a deathbed confession involving a number of crimes from decades earlier.

programme.title: Chicago Fire

programme.title: Chicago Fire

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: Severide starts off on the wrong foot at his Office of Fire Investigation assignment when, despite orders, he reopens an old case; Herrmann is on a mission to discover what caused an apartment fire; Kidd finds herself burning the candle at both ends.

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: An unexpected visit throws Casey for a loop; Severide sets out to exonerate a wrongly convicted arsonist; Kidd pays the price for burning the candle at both ends; Cruz goes on a mission to fix one of Otis's old toys.

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: Members of Firehouse 51 are dismayed to learn their boundaries have been redrawn to overlap with an adjacent station, and problems quickly arise; Casey and Gallo hunt a missing piece of equipment; Brett and Foster find themselves at odds.

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: A pest control problem forces the 51 team to temporarily bunk with Firehouse 20; all under the same roof, Casey clashes with Capt. Delaney, while Foster, Kidd and Brett fear Capt. Leone has it out for them; Boden mulls a procedural overhaul.

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: A series of false alarms at a private school hinders 51's ability to respond to legitimate emergencies; Kidd asks for ideas to surprise Severide on his birthday; Cruz and Brett rent out their extra room but get more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: The surprising arrival of a new fire truck brings both joy and chaos to members of Firehouse 51; Boden and Severide are asked to make peace with an old foe for the greater good; Brett receives family news while Foster plans a party with friends.

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: A series of mysterious gas leaks has members of Firehouse 51 puzzled and spread thin; Brett's conflicted when her birth mother gets serious about finding her; Severide misunderstands his role as Cruz's best man; Mouch bites off more than he can chew.

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: A series of teen opioid overdoses sees Severide partner with Sean Roman, but he begins to suspect there's more to the story than his old friend is telling him; Casey tries to be there for Brett as she considers her birth mother's offer to meet.
